summary: Completed comprehensive testing of House Socioeconomic Analyzer React app. All core features working perfectly including backend APIs, file upload, image preview, AI analysis, and results display with detailed classification.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct message
Backend health check (/api/health) confirms API key configured
Backend properly handles missing file uploads (422 status)
Backend properly handles invalid file types with error response
Backend AI analysis endpoint works with real image (1664 char response)
React app loads correctly with proper header and sections
File upload component accepts PNG/JPG/JPEG/WEBP images
Image preview displays after upload with correct filename
Analyze button becomes enabled after image upload
Context input field accepts additional information
AI analysis returns detailed JSON classification with reasoning
Results display properly with success icon and classification badge
Classification shows 'Low Income' with 95% confidence and detailed observations
All 5 classification categories displayed correctly (Low Income through High Income)
Loading states display during analysis processing
Error handling works for invalid file types
Drag & drop zone is properly styled and functional
